key_decisions: Enhance dragCard ref to store full card data for multi-day card handling
Detect drag direction: vertical (same day, different time) vs horizontal (different day)
Add all-day row drop handlers to allow removing time from cards
Preserve time when dragging horizontally, preserve date when dragging vertically
patterns_identified: Week view drag requires distinguishing between time and date changes
Multi-day cards need special handling to shift both dates consistently
